calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-21-2016 Off Calendar

Notice And Motion For Order Dismissing Complaint Of Plaintiff Craig Bell For Failure To Comply With Court Order To File Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. SUSAN E. COLEMAN OF THE BURKE WILLIAMS & SORENSEN LLP, TEL. NO. 1-213-236-0600 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT THE GEO GROUP, INC.'S Motion For Order Dismissing Complaint Of Plaintiff Craig Bell For Failure To Comply With Court Order To File Amended Complaint is granted. The case is dismissed with prejudice. No opposition filed.
Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/hk

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-19-2016 Continued To Jul-26-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-23-2016 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-24-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2016 Continued To Apr-13-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-22-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Craig Bell telephone number 510-646-2016 Plaintiff in Propria Persona.
Susan Coleman of Burke, Williams & Sorensen LLP telephone number 213-236-8080 appeared by telephone for Defendant.

The court modified its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT THE GEO GROUP, INC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 30 days leave to amend from notice entry of order. No opposition filed. Mr. Coleman is to provide a proposed order.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Continued To Feb-10-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
